validated_objective: Add runtime-native release-state synchronization and drift detection for the self-hosting repo after each release.
scope: release-state drift audit across operator surfaces
runtime-native refresh/update path for active release refs
constraints: Do not weaken Need Validation or backend-neutral boundaries.
Do not rely on manual JSON editing as the primary operating method.
expected_outcomes: active runtime surfaces resolve through one truthful release baseline
release drift becomes benchmarkable and repairable
